_metadata.description: Canvas Semester Setup Agent — updates all assignment due dates for a new semester based on the Week 1 start date.
_metadata.usage: See canvas_semester_setup.md for narrative guide. All writes go through Canvas assignments API.

agent_details.description: Computes and pushes all assignment due dates for a new semester. Input: Week 1 Monday + semester end date. Output: 40+ Canvas API updates + local file edits.

agent_type.description: Propose-before-execute agent. Reads index and week map, computes new dates, shows full diff for approval, then pushes all updates in one pass.

utc_offset_rules._note: Mountain Time. 11:59 PM MT due time.

MDT.applies_to: Spring and Summer semesters (mid-April through late October)

MST.applies_to: Winter and Fall semesters (late October through mid-April)

week_structure._note: Weeks run Monday–Sunday. Due date = Sunday 11:59 PM MT. Exceptions noted in special_due_dates.

week_assignment_map._note: canvas_id → week number. For assignments/NewQuizzes, canvas_id IS the assignment_id. For Syllabus Quiz (classic quiz), use assignment_id from special_due_dates.

canvas_ids.title: W01 Syllabus Quiz (classic quiz — use assignment_id, not quiz_id)
W02 DAG? Demo 2: API to Snowflake

9.title: Week 9 — Demo 3 due Monday (start of week), rest due Sunday of W9

canvas_ids.title: W09 Milestone 4: dbt Project Setup + Staged Schema + Staging Tests
W10 Milestone 5: Warehouse Dimensional Model + Warehouse Tests
W12 Milestone 7: DS Mart (Python + Cortex) + Tests

14.title: Week 14 — due last day of semester (may not be Sunday)

canvas_ids.title: W14 Self Assessment: Final Performance Review

w09_demo3_monday.title: W09 Demo 3: dbt
w09_demo3_monday.rule: Due Monday of Week 9 (first day of the week), not Sunday. Compute as: Week 9 Monday = Week 1 Monday + 8*7 days.

w14_end_of_semester.rule: Due the actual last day of semester at 11:59 PM MT. This may be a Wednesday or Friday, not Sunday. Always ask for the explicit last day.

syllabus_quiz_assignment_id.note: Classic Canvas Quiz. Due dates must be set via PUT /assignments/16858181, not /quizzes/5911959.

skip_list._note: Never update due dates for these items — managed by BYUI central systems.

assignment_update.note: Always include lock_at and unlock_at as null. Reading quizzes will 400 without this.

pre_run_checklist: Confirm semester name and Week 1 Monday date with instructor
Confirm last day of semester (may not align to week boundary)
Determine MDT vs MST based on semester dates
Run `uv run python tools/canvas_sync.py --init` if index is older than 1 week
Check skip_list — do not include those canvas_ids in updates
post_run_checklist: Spot-check 3 assignments in Canvas UI for correct local time display
Verify W09 Demo 3 is due Monday, not Sunday
Verify W14 items are due on the semester end date
Verify reading quizzes have no lock/unlock dates showing
Confirm Syllabus Quiz shows updated due date (classic quiz uses assignment_id)

related_agents.name: canvas_course_expert
related_agents.relationship: Full audit and content editing agent — use for content changes, not date updates

authoritative_files: .canvas/index.json (modules[] items contain due_at, lock_at, unlock_at after --init)
course/setup-notes-and-course-settings (Canvas page — week structure and timing rules)
